title: Workload Ranking Example
content: Which athletes had the highest workload last week? maps to summed total_distance grouped by athlete over the recent 7 day window, with sprint distance, high intensity efforts, and duration returned as supporting columns.

title: Sprint Distance by Position Example
content: Show average sprint distance by position over the last 30 days maps to AVG(gps_metrics.sprint_distance) grouped by athletes.position after joining gps_metrics to sessions and athletes.

title: Baseline Comparison Example
content: Who is trending below their baseline performance? maps to a historical-average-versus-recent-average comparison, filtered to athletes whose recent total_distance is below their earlier average.
